sentences.text_en: Yes, yes, I know.
sentences.text_zh: 是的，是的，我知道。

sentences.text_en: I got Boo Boo Bear from the freezer.
sentences.text_zh: 我把布布熊从冰箱里拿出来了。

sentences.text_en: Why do you have chocolate on your face?
sentences.text_zh: 你脸上怎么有巧克力？

sentences.text_en: It was under a pie.
sentences.text_zh: 它在派下面呢。

sentences.text_en: So you ate your way to it?
sentences.text_zh: 所以你是吃着找到它的吗？

sentences.text_en: I made a judgment call.
sentences.text_zh: 我做了个判断。

sentences.text_en: You weren't there.
sentences.text_zh: 你当时不在场。

sentences.text_en: Do you think she's all right?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得她没事吧？

sentences.text_en: She didn't cry that much.
sentences.text_zh: 她没哭太多。

sentences.text_en: Maybe that's a bad sign.
sentences.text_zh: 也许这是个不好的信号。

sentences.text_en: You know, we should try and make her laugh.
sentences.text_zh: 你知道吗，我们应该试着让她笑一笑。

sentences.text_en: Why?
sentences.text_zh: 为什么？

sentences.text_en: 'Cause that's how we'll know she's okay.
sentences.text_zh: 因为那样我们才能知道她是不是还好。

sentences.text_en: Where's um, where's Doggie?
sentences.text_zh: 狗狗呢，狗狗在哪里？

sentences.text_en: Doggie, Doggie.
sentences.text_zh: 狗狗，狗狗。

sentences.text_en: Here, Doggie.
sentences.text_zh: 在这儿，狗狗。

sentences.text_en: Okay, there you go.
sentences.text_zh: 好了，给你了。

sentences.text_en: Moo, but it's a dog.
sentences.text_zh: 哞，不过这是一只狗。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, I know, that's why it's funny.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，我知道，所以才好笑。

sentences.text_en: Moo.
sentences.text_zh: 哞。

sentences.text_en: I don't think it's as funny as you think it is.
sentences.text_zh: 我觉得没你想的那么好笑。

sentences.text_en: Can we please just call your sister?
sentences.text_zh: 我们能不能就给你的姐姐打个电话？

sentences.text_en: No, no, Cam, Cam, why?
sentences.text_zh: 不行，不行，卡姆，卡姆，为什么？

sentences.text_en: So she can be all judgmental and condescending like she's the expert and I don't know how to take care of a baby?
sentences.text_zh: 就为了让她像专家一样指手画脚、居高临下，还说我不懂怎么照顾宝宝？

sentences.text_en: Mitchell, she is your family.
sentences.text_zh: 米切尔，她是你的家人啊。

sentences.text_en: Of course she's gonna be judgmental and condescending.
sentences.text_zh: 当然会指手画脚、居高临下啦。

sentences.text_en: Hello?
sentences.text_zh: 喂？

sentences.text_en: Hey, hi, um, not a big deal, just wondering.
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，嗨，嗯，没什么大不了的，就是随便问问。

sentences.text_en: When your kids were small, did you ever, I don't know, smack their heads into a wall?
sentences.text_zh: 你家孩子小时候，有没有……嗯，我不知道，把他们的头往墙上撞过？

sentences.text_en: Usually we just gave time outs.
sentences.text_zh: 一般我们都是让他们去‘暂停’一下。

sentences.text_en: Oh, no, no, accidentally.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，不不，是不小心的。

sentences.text_en: Um, we just kind of bonked Lily's head and she, it really wasn't very hard and she's not acting any differently, but I just worried that. . .
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我们就轻轻碰了一下莉莉的头，其实也没多用力，她也没表现出什么不一样，但我就是有点担心……

sentences.text_en: Relax, it happens.
sentences.text_zh: 别紧张，这种事常有的。

sentences.text_en: Luke used to bang his head all the time and he's fine.
sentences.text_zh: 卢克以前老是用头撞墙，现在不是挺好的吗？

sentences.text_en: Okay, all right, thank you, thanks, it helps.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，行吧，谢谢，这很有帮助。

sentences.text_en: Okay, okay.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，好吧。

sentences.text_en: We gotta take her to the doctor.
sentences.text_zh: 我们得带她去看医生。

sentences.text_en: Gloria?
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚？

sentences.text_en: I'm here.
sentences.text_zh: 我在这儿。

sentences.text_en: I just dropped Manny off at school, and I realized I just dropped Manny off at school.
sentences.text_zh: 我刚把曼尼送到学校，然后才意识到自己居然把曼尼送到了学校。

sentences.text_en: Oh, boy.
sentences.text_zh: 哎呀。

sentences.text_en: And I was hoping we still have a few more good years before their minds started to. . .
sentences.text_zh: 我还想着，他们的小脑袋还能再好好用上几年呢……

sentences.text_en: No, what I'm saying, we have the day to ourselves the first time in months.
sentences.text_zh: 不，我的意思是，几个月来我们第一次有了属于自己的这一天。

sentences.text_en: We should take advantage of it.
sentences.text_zh: 咱们应该好好利用一下。

sentences.text_en: Go to the club, nice lunch.
sentences.text_zh: 去俱乐部逛逛，吃顿不错的午餐。

sentences.text_en: Some massages.
sentences.text_zh: 再来几次按摩。

sentences.text_en: What about work?
sentences.text_zh: 那工作呢？

sentences.text_en: I'm the boss.
sentences.text_zh: 我是老板啊。

sentences.text_en: Since I married you, people are surprised I come in at all.
sentences.text_zh: 自从嫁给你以后，大家还以为我根本不会来上班呢。

sentences.text_en: Jay's very spontaneous.
sentences.text_zh: 杰很随性。

sentences.text_en: He's always surprising me with little presents, fun getaways.
sentences.text_zh: 他总给我惊喜，送些小礼物、安排些有趣的短途旅行。

sentences.text_en: I wasn't the greatest husband the first time around, but I'm trying to do better this time.
sentences.text_zh: 上次当老公的时候，我做得不算太好，不过这次我正努力改进呢。

sentences.text_en: And maybe by my third marriage, I'll have it down pat.
sentences.text_zh: 说不定到第三次结婚的时候，我就完全上手了。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, that one's gonna cost me.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，那可要花不少钱呢。

sentences.text_en: What you're reading, there, a book?
sentences.text_zh: 你在看什么呢，书吗？

sentences.text_en: Yeah, I've been meaning to get to it for a while.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，我一直想看看这本书呢。

sentences.text_en: Oh, it's got a map at the beginning.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，开头还有张地图呢。

sentences.text_en: I like it when books do that.
sentences.text_zh: 我喜欢书里有这样的设计。

sentences.text_en: Uh huh.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯哼。

sentences.text_en: Did you have an open house this morning?
sentences.text_zh: 今天上午你有开放日吗？

sentences.text_en: I rescheduled.
sentences.text_zh: 我改了时间。

sentences.text_en: Thought you might like some company.
sentences.text_zh: 想着你可能会需要点陪伴。

sentences.text_en: Well, the first day of school can be tough for stay-at-home moms.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，对居家妈妈来说，开学第一天可不容易呢。

sentences.text_en: Now you have to understand, the kids are gone, the nest is empty, they are rudderless.
sentences.text_zh: 现在你要明白，孩子们走了，家里空荡荡的，他们就像没了舵一样。

sentences.text_en: And a lot of guys wouldn't even notice, but I'm not a lot of guys.
sentences.text_zh: 很多男人可能根本注意不到，但我不算那种人。

sentences.text_en: I listen with my mind, and if you pay attention, women will tell you what they want by telling you the opposite of what they want.
sentences.text_zh: 我用心去听，只要你留心，女人就会通过告诉你她们不要什么，来表达她们想要什么。

sentences.text_en: Like the other day, Claire was like, "You have to move your car.
sentences.text_zh: 就像前几天，克莱尔说：‘你得把车挪走。’

sentences.text_en: There's no space in the garage for both of our cars."
sentences.text_zh: 车库里没地方放我们俩的车了。'

sentences.text_en: And what she's really saying is that, you know, I should probably get a sports car.
sentences.text_zh: 其实她真正想说的是，你知道的，我大概该买辆跑车了。

sentences.text_en: I was sort of looking forward to a quiet day.
sentences.text_zh: 我本来还挺期待过个安静日子的。

sentences.text_en: I thought I'd just read, maybe go for a run later.
sentences.text_zh: 我想就看看书，说不定待会儿去跑跑步。

sentences.text_en: That's it.
sentences.text_zh: 就这样。

sentences.text_en: Great, we'll run together.
sentences.text_zh: 太好了，我们一起跑吧。

sentences.text_en: You don't have to do that.
sentences.text_zh: 你不用非得这样。

sentences.text_en: I know.
sentences.text_zh: 我知道。

sentences.text_en: Listening.
sentences.text_zh: 听着。

sentences.text_en: Thing is, I like to run alone and I run kind of fast, so.
sentences.text_zh: 问题是，我喜欢一个人跑，而且跑得挺快的，所以……

sentences.text_en: So I'm not sure you're gonna be able to keep up with me.
sentences.text_zh: 所以我真不确定你能不能跟上我。

sentences.text_en: You're kidding, right?
sentences.text_zh: 你在开玩笑吧？

sentences.text_en: No.
sentences.text_zh: 不。

sentences.text_en: You really think I can't keep up with you?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的觉得我跟不上你吗？

sentences.text_en: I'm not sure you can keep up with this conversation.
sentences.text_zh: 我不确定你能不能跟上这场对话。

sentences.text_en: I think you're forgetting that I power walk every morning and that I wear my special shoes with the big soles, which were designed by a doctor.
sentences.text_zh: 我觉得你忘了，我每天早上都快步走，还穿那种医生专门设计的大底鞋。

sentences.text_en: Yes, I know.
sentences.text_zh: 是的，我知道。

sentences.text_en: But I run every day.
sentences.text_zh: 但我每天都跑啊。

sentences.text_en: You really think you can run as fast as me?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的觉得你能跑得跟我一样快吗？

sentences.text_en: No, Phil, I think I can run much, much faster than you.
sentences.text_zh: 不，菲尔，我觉得我能跑得比你快得多、多得多。

sentences.text_en: Boom, just like that, the whole day changed.
sentences.text_zh: 砰的一下，整天就这么变了。

sentences.text_en: It was game on.
sentences.text_zh: 比赛开始了。

sentences.text_en: She knew it, I knew it, we both knew it.
sentences.text_zh: 她知道，我知道，我们俩都知道。

sentences.text_en: I just want to read.
sentences.text_zh: 我就想看看书。

sentences.text_en: I think I'll order what I had the last time.
sentences.text_zh: 我想点上次点过的那道菜。

sentences.text_en: What was that called?
sentences.text_zh: 那叫什么来着？

sentences.text_en: Do you just want me to say it because you want me to roll my eyes?
sentences.text_zh: 你是想让我念出来，好让你翻个白眼吗？

sentences.text_en: Come on.
sentences.text_zh: 拜托。

sentences.text_en: Ruben.
sentences.text_zh: 鲁本。

sentences.text_en: Jay, what is this?
sentences.text_zh: 杰伊，这是啥？

sentences.text_en: Ah, looks like my old car cover.
sentences.text_zh: 啊，看起来像是我以前的车罩。

sentences.text_en: Don't give me that, this is Manny's poncho.
sentences.text_zh: 别这套了，这可是曼尼的雨披。

sentences.text_en: What is it doing here?
sentences.text_zh: 它怎么在这儿？

sentences.text_en: Maybe he decided to take it off on the way to school.
sentences.text_zh: 也许他上学路上就把它脱了。

sentences.text_en: What did you say to him?
sentences.text_zh: 你跟他说了啥？

sentences.text_en: Nothing, I told some jokes.
sentences.text_zh: 没说什么，就是讲了几段笑话。

sentences.text_en: You said plenty with your jokes.
sentences.text_zh: 你用笑话可说得够多了。

sentences.text_en: Jay, he looks up to you.
sentences.text_zh: 杰伊，他可仰慕你呢。

sentences.text_en: He respects your opinion.
sentences.text_zh: 他很尊重你的意见。

sentences.text_en: We dodged a bullet on this, trust me.
sentences.text_zh: 这事咱们算是躲过去了，相信我。

sentences.text_en: I've been down this road before.
sentences.text_zh: 这条路我走过不少次了。

sentences.text_en: I remember one time Mitchell decided to wear a jaunty scarf to school.
sentences.text_zh: 我记得有一次米切尔决定戴条俏皮的围巾去上学。

sentences.text_en: I kept my mouth shut.
sentences.text_zh: 我啥也没说。

sentences.text_en: He got his jaunty butt kicked.
sentences.text_zh: 结果他那副俏皮样儿就被揍了一顿。

sentences.text_en: My dad has this perception that I was very flamboyant as a kid, which is just it's nonsense because I kept the whole gay thing very under wraps.
sentences.text_zh: 我爸总以为我小时候特别张扬，其实纯属胡扯，因为我一直把‘同性恋’这事藏得严严实实。

sentences.text_en: I was just a guy's guy.
sentences.text_zh: 我就是个‘男人中的男人’。

sentences.text_en: I was basically a jock, you know?
sentences.text_zh: 基本上就是个运动健将，你知道吧？

sentences.text_en: So we should crush Manny's spirit and destroy everything that makes him who he is.
sentences.text_zh: 所以我们应该狠狠打击曼尼的士气，把他身上所有让他成为自己的东西都给毁了。

sentences.text_en: I'm just saying it's no fun to see your kid get picked on every day, getting tormented just because he's different.
sentences.text_zh: 我只是说，看着自家孩子天天被欺负、被折磨，就因为与众不同，真让人受不了。

sentences.text_en: Now I'm telling you, it rips your heart out.
sentences.text_zh: 现在我告诉你，这简直能把心都撕碎。

sentences.text_en: Well, Batman doesn't get picked on and he wears a cape.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，蝙蝠侠就不被欺负，他还穿着斗篷呢。

sentences.text_en: A poncho is just a cape that goes all the way around.
sentences.text_zh: 雨披其实就是一圈兜住全身的斗篷。

sentences.text_en: Batman doesn't get picked on because he's a muscular genius.
sentences.text_zh: 蝙蝠侠之所以不被欺负，是因为他是肌肉发达的天才。

sentences.text_en: Manny can't make it to the top bunk.
sentences.text_zh: 曼尼上不了上铺。

sentences.text_en: We're taking this poncho to Manny at school.
sentences.text_zh: 我们要把这件雨披带到学校给曼尼。

sentences.text_en: It's important that he knows that we support him.
sentences.text_zh: 让他知道我们支持他，这点很重要。

sentences.text_en: And then we go get those massages, 'cause that sounded good.
sentences.text_zh: 然后我们再去做个按摩，听起来挺不错的。

sentences.text_en: Why do you have chocolate on your face?

sentences.text_en: It was under a pie.
sentences.text_zh: 它在派下面呢。

sentences.text_en: So you ate your way to it?
sentences.text_zh: 所以你是吃着找到它的吗？

sentences.text_en: I made a judgment call.
sentences.text_zh: 我做了个判断。

sentences.text_en: You weren't there.
sentences.text_zh: 你当时不在场。

sentences.text_en: Do you think she's all right?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得她没事吧？

sentences.text_en: She didn't cry that much.
sentences.text_zh: 她没哭太多。

sentences.text_en: Maybe that's a bad sign.
sentences.text_zh: 也许这是个不好的信号。

sentences.text_en: You know, we should try and make her laugh.
sentences.text_zh: 你知道吗，我们应该试着让她笑一笑。

sentences.text_en: Why?
sentences.text_zh: 为什么？

sentences.text_en: 'Cause that's how we'll know she's okay.
sentences.text_zh: 因为那样我们才能知道她是不是还好。

sentences.text_en: Where's um, where's Doggie?
sentences.text_zh: 狗狗呢，狗狗在哪里？

sentences.text_en: Doggie, Doggie.
sentences.text_zh: 狗狗，狗狗。

sentences.text_en: Here, Doggie.
sentences.text_zh: 在这儿，狗狗。

sentences.text_en: Okay, there you go.
sentences.text_zh: 好了，给你了。

sentences.text_en: Moo, but it's a dog.
sentences.text_zh: 哞，不过这是一只狗。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, I know, that's why it's funny.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，我知道，所以才好笑。

sentences.text_en: Moo.

sentences.text_en: I don't think it's as funny as you think it is.
sentences.text_zh: 我觉得没你想的那么好笑。

sentences.text_en: Can we please just call your sister?
sentences.text_zh: 我们能不能就给你的姐姐打个电话？

sentences.text_en: No, no, Cam, Cam, why?

sentences.text_en: So she can be all judgmental and condescending like she's the expert and I don't know how to take care of a baby?
sentences.text_zh: 就为了让她像专家一样指手画脚、居高临下，还说我不懂怎么照顾宝宝？

sentences.text_en: Mitchell, she is your family.
sentences.text_zh: 米切尔，她是你的家人啊。

sentences.text_en: Of course she's gonna be judgmental and condescending.
sentences.text_zh: 当然会指手画脚、居高临下啦。

sentences.text_en: Hello?
sentences.text_zh: 喂？

sentences.text_en: Hey, hi, um, not a big deal, just wondering.
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，嗨，嗯，没什么大不了的，就是随便问问。

sentences.text_en: When your kids were small, did you ever, I don't know, smack their heads into a wall?
sentences.text_zh: 你家孩子小时候，有没有……嗯，我不知道，把他们的头往墙上撞过？

sentences.text_en: Usually we just gave time outs.
sentences.text_zh: 一般我们都是让他们去‘暂停’一下。

sentences.text_en: Oh, no, no, accidentally.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，不不，是不小心的。

sentences.text_en: Um, we just kind of bonked Lily's head and she, it really wasn't very hard and she's not acting any differently, but I just worried that. . .
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我们就轻轻碰了一下莉莉的头，其实也没多用力，她也没表现出什么不一样，但我就是有点担心……

sentences.text_en: Relax, it happens.
sentences.text_zh: 别紧张，这种事常有的。

sentences.text_en: Luke used to bang his head all the time and he's fine.
sentences.text_zh: 卢克以前老是用头撞墙，现在不是挺好的吗？

sentences.text_en: Okay, all right, thank you, thanks, it helps.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，行吧，谢谢，这很有帮助。

sentences.text_en: Okay, okay.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，好吧。

sentences.text_en: We gotta take her to the doctor.
sentences.text_zh: 我们得带她去看医生。

sentences.text_en: Gloria?
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚？

sentences.text_en: I'm here.
sentences.text_zh: 我在这儿。

sentences.text_en: I just dropped Manny off at school, and I realized I just dropped Manny off at school.
sentences.text_zh: 我刚把曼尼送到学校，然后才意识到自己居然把曼尼送到了学校。

sentences.text_en: Oh, boy.
sentences.text_zh: 哎呀。

sentences.text_en: And I was hoping we still have a few more good years before their minds started to. . .
sentences.text_zh: 我还想着，他们的小脑袋还能再好好用上几年呢……

sentences.text_en: No, what I'm saying, we have the day to ourselves the first time in months.
sentences.text_zh: 不，我的意思是，几个月来我们第一次有了属于自己的这一天。

sentences.text_en: We should take advantage of it.
sentences.text_zh: 咱们应该好好利用一下。

sentences.text_en: Go to the club, nice lunch.
sentences.text_zh: 去俱乐部逛逛，吃顿不错的午餐。

sentences.text_en: Some massages.
sentences.text_zh: 再来几次按摩。

sentences.text_en: What about work?
sentences.text_zh: 那工作呢？

sentences.text_en: I'm the boss.
sentences.text_zh: 我是老板啊。

sentences.text_en: Since I married you, people are surprised I come in at all.
sentences.text_zh: 自从嫁给你以后，大家还以为我根本不会来上班呢。

sentences.text_en: Jay's very spontaneous.
sentences.text_zh: 杰很随性。

sentences.text_en: He's always surprising me with little presents, fun getaways.
sentences.text_zh: 他总给我惊喜，送些小礼物、安排些有趣的短途旅行。

sentences.text_en: I wasn't the greatest husband the first time around, but I'm trying to do better this time.
sentences.text_zh: 上次当老公的时候，我做得不算太好，不过这次我正努力改进呢。

sentences.text_en: And maybe by my third marriage, I'll have it down pat.
sentences.text_zh: 说不定到第三次结婚的时候，我就完全上手了。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, that one's gonna cost me.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，那可要花不少钱呢。

sentences.text_en: What you're reading, there, a book?
sentences.text_zh: 你在看什么呢，书吗？

sentences.text_en: Yeah, I've been meaning to get to it for a while.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，我一直想看看这本书呢。

sentences.text_en: Oh, it's got a map at the beginning.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，开头还有张地图呢。

sentences.text_en: I like it when books do that.
sentences.text_zh: 我喜欢书里有这样的设计。

sentences.text_en: Uh huh.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯哼。

sentences.text_en: Did you have an open house this morning?
sentences.text_zh: 今天上午你有开放日吗？

sentences.text_en: I rescheduled.
sentences.text_zh: 我改了时间。

sentences.text_en: Thought you might like some company.
sentences.text_zh: 想着你可能会需要点陪伴。

sentences.text_en: Well, the first day of school can be tough for stay-at-home moms.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，对居家妈妈来说，开学第一天可不容易呢。

sentences.text_en: Now you have to understand, the kids are gone, the nest is empty, they are rudderless.
sentences.text_zh: 现在你要明白，孩子们走了，家里空荡荡的，他们就像没了舵一样。

sentences.text_en: And a lot of guys wouldn't even notice, but I'm not a lot of guys.
sentences.text_zh: 很多男人可能根本注意不到，但我不算那种人。

sentences.text_en: I listen with my mind, and if you pay attention, women will tell you what they want by telling you the opposite of what they want.
sentences.text_zh: 我用心去听，只要你留心，女人就会通过告诉你她们不要什么，来表达她们想要什么。

sentences.text_en: Like the other day, Claire was like, "You have to move your car.
sentences.text_zh: 就像前几天，克莱尔说：‘你得把车挪走。’

sentences.text_en: There's no space in the garage for both of our cars."
sentences.text_zh: 车库里没地方放我们俩的车了。'

sentences.text_en: And what she's really saying is that, you know, I should probably get a sports car.
sentences.text_zh: 其实她真正想说的是，你知道的，我大概该买辆跑车了。

sentences.text_en: I was sort of looking forward to a quiet day.
sentences.text_zh: 我本来还挺期待过个安静日子的。

sentences.text_en: I thought I'd just read, maybe go for a run later.
sentences.text_zh: 我想就看看书，说不定待会儿去跑跑步。

sentences.text_en: That's it.
sentences.text_zh: 就这样。

sentences.text_en: Great, we'll run together.
sentences.text_zh: 太好了，我们一起跑吧。

sentences.text_en: You don't have to do that.
sentences.text_zh: 你不用非得这样。

sentences.text_en: I know.
sentences.text_zh: 我知道。

sentences.text_en: Listening.
sentences.text_zh: 听着。

sentences.text_en: Thing is, I like to run alone and I run kind of fast, so.
sentences.text_zh: 问题是，我喜欢一个人跑，而且跑得挺快的，所以……

sentences.text_en: So I'm not sure you're gonna be able to keep up with me.
sentences.text_zh: 所以我真不确定你能不能跟上我。

sentences.text_en: You're kidding, right?
sentences.text_zh: 你在开玩笑吧？

sentences.text_en: No.
sentences.text_zh: 不。

sentences.text_en: You really think I can't keep up with you?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的觉得我跟不上你吗？

sentences.text_en: I'm not sure you can keep up with this conversation.
sentences.text_zh: 我不确定你能不能跟上这场对话。

sentences.text_en: I think you're forgetting that I power walk every morning and that I wear my special shoes with the big soles, which were designed by a doctor.
sentences.text_zh: 我觉得你忘了，我每天早上都快步走，还穿那种医生专门设计的大底鞋。

sentences.text_en: Yes, I know.
sentences.text_zh: 是的，我知道。

sentences.text_en: But I run every day.
sentences.text_zh: 但我每天都跑啊。

sentences.text_en: You really think you can run as fast as me?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的觉得你能跑得跟我一样快吗？

sentences.text_en: No, Phil, I think I can run much, much faster than you.
sentences.text_zh: 不，菲尔，我觉得我能跑得比你快得多、多得多。

sentences.text_en: Boom, just like that, the whole day changed.
sentences.text_zh: 砰的一下，整天就这么变了。

sentences.text_en: It was game on.
sentences.text_zh: 比赛开始了。

sentences.text_en: She knew it, I knew it, we both knew it.
sentences.text_zh: 她知道，我知道，我们俩都知道。

sentences.text_en: I just want to read.
sentences.text_zh: 我就想看看书。

sentences.text_en: I think I'll order what I had the last time.
sentences.text_zh: 我想点上次点过的那道菜。

sentences.text_en: What was that called?
sentences.text_zh: 那叫什么来着？

sentences.text_en: Do you just want me to say it because you want me to roll my eyes?
sentences.text_zh: 你是想让我念出来，好让你翻个白眼吗？

sentences.text_en: Come on.
sentences.text_zh: 拜托。

sentences.text_en: Ruben.
sentences.text_zh: 鲁本。

sentences.text_en: Jay, what is this?
sentences.text_zh: 杰伊，这是啥？

sentences.text_en: Ah, looks like my old car cover.
sentences.text_zh: 啊，看起来像是我以前的车罩。

sentences.text_en: Don't give me that, this is Manny's poncho.
sentences.text_zh: 别这套了，这可是曼尼的雨披。

sentences.text_en: What is it doing here?
sentences.text_zh: 它怎么在这儿？

sentences.text_en: Maybe he decided to take it off on the way to school.
sentences.text_zh: 也许他上学路上就把它脱了。

sentences.text_en: What did you say to him?
sentences.text_zh: 你跟他说了啥？

sentences.text_en: Nothing, I told some jokes.
sentences.text_zh: 没说什么，就是讲了几段笑话。

sentences.text_en: You said plenty with your jokes.
sentences.text_zh: 你用笑话可说得够多了。

sentences.text_en: Jay, he looks up to you.
sentences.text_zh: 杰伊，他可仰慕你呢。

sentences.text_en: He respects your opinion.
sentences.text_zh: 他很尊重你的意见。

sentences.text_en: We dodged a bullet on this, trust me.
sentences.text_zh: 这事咱们算是躲过去了，相信我。

sentences.text_en: I've been down this road before.
sentences.text_zh: 这条路我走过不少次了。

sentences.text_en: I remember one time Mitchell decided to wear a jaunty scarf to school.
sentences.text_zh: 我记得有一次米切尔决定戴条俏皮的围巾去上学。

sentences.text_en: I kept my mouth shut.
sentences.text_zh: 我啥也没说。

sentences.text_en: He got his jaunty butt kicked.
sentences.text_zh: 结果他那副俏皮样儿就被揍了一顿。

sentences.text_en: My dad has this perception that I was very flamboyant as a kid, which is just it's nonsense because I kept the whole gay thing very under wraps.
sentences.text_zh: 我爸总以为我小时候特别张扬，其实纯属胡扯，因为我一直把‘同性恋’这事藏得严严实实。

sentences.text_en: I was just a guy's guy.
sentences.text_zh: 我就是个‘男人中的男人’。

sentences.text_en: I was basically a jock, you know?
sentences.text_zh: 基本上就是个运动健将，你知道吧？

sentences.text_en: So we should crush Manny's spirit and destroy everything that makes him who he is.
sentences.text_zh: 所以我们应该狠狠打击曼尼的士气，把他身上所有让他成为自己的东西都给毁了。

sentences.text_en: I'm just saying it's no fun to see your kid get picked on every day, getting tormented just because he's different.
sentences.text_zh: 我只是说，看着自家孩子天天被欺负、被折磨，就因为与众不同，真让人受不了。

sentences.text_en: Now I'm telling you, it rips your heart out.
sentences.text_zh: 现在我告诉你，这简直能把心都撕碎。

sentences.text_en: Well, Batman doesn't get picked on and he wears a cape.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，蝙蝠侠就不被欺负，他还穿着斗篷呢。

sentences.text_en: A poncho is just a cape that goes all the way around.
sentences.text_zh: 雨披其实就是一圈兜住全身的斗篷。

sentences.text_en: Batman doesn't get picked on because he's a muscular genius.
sentences.text_zh: 蝙蝠侠之所以不被欺负，是因为他是肌肉发达的天才。

sentences.text_en: Manny can't make it to the top bunk.
sentences.text_zh: 曼尼上不了上铺。

sentences.text_en: We're taking this poncho to Manny at school.
sentences.text_zh: 我们要把这件雨披带到学校给曼尼。

sentences.text_en: It's important that he knows that we support him.
sentences.text_zh: 让他知道我们支持他，这点很重要。

sentences.text_en: And then we go get those massages, 'cause that sounded good.
sentences.text_zh: 然后我们再去做个按摩，听起来挺不错的。

sentences.text_en: It was under a pie.
sentences.text_zh: 它在派下面呢。

sentences.text_en: So you ate your way to it?
sentences.text_zh: 所以你是吃着找到它的吗？

sentences.text_en: I made a judgment call.
sentences.text_zh: 我做了个判断。

sentences.text_en: You weren't there.
sentences.text_zh: 你当时不在场。

sentences.text_en: Do you think she's all right?
sentences.text_zh: 你觉得她没事吧？

sentences.text_en: She didn't cry that much.
sentences.text_zh: 她没哭太多。

sentences.text_en: Maybe that's a bad sign.
sentences.text_zh: 也许这是个不好的信号。

sentences.text_en: You know, we should try and make her laugh.
sentences.text_zh: 你知道吗，我们应该试着让她笑一笑。

sentences.text_en: Why?
sentences.text_zh: 为什么？

sentences.text_en: 'Cause that's how we'll know she's okay.
sentences.text_zh: 因为那样我们才能知道她是不是还好。

sentences.text_en: Where's um, where's Doggie?
sentences.text_zh: 狗狗呢，狗狗在哪里？

sentences.text_en: Doggie, Doggie.
sentences.text_zh: 狗狗，狗狗。

sentences.text_en: Here, Doggie.
sentences.text_zh: 在这儿，狗狗。

sentences.text_en: Okay, there you go.
sentences.text_zh: 好了，给你了。

sentences.text_en: Moo, but it's a dog.
sentences.text_zh: 哞，不过这是一只狗。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, I know, that's why it's funny.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，我知道，所以才好笑。

sentences.text_en: Moo.
sentences.text_zh: 哞。

sentences.text_en: I don't think it's as funny as you think it is.
sentences.text_zh: 我觉得没你想的那么好笑。

sentences.text_en: Can we please just call your sister?
sentences.text_zh: 我们能不能就给你的姐姐打个电话？

sentences.text_en: No, no, Cam, Cam, why?
sentences.text_zh: 不行，不行，卡姆，卡姆，为什么？

sentences.text_en: So she can be all judgmental and condescending like she's the expert and I don't know how to take care of a baby?
sentences.text_zh: 就为了让她像专家一样指手画脚、居高临下，还说我不懂怎么照顾宝宝？

sentences.text_en: Mitchell, she is your family.
sentences.text_zh: 米切尔，她是你的家人啊。

sentences.text_en: Of course she's gonna be judgmental and condescending.
sentences.text_zh: 当然会指手画脚、居高临下啦。

sentences.text_en: Hello?
sentences.text_zh: 喂？

sentences.text_en: Hey, hi, um, not a big deal, just wondering.
sentences.text_zh: 嘿，嗨，嗯，没什么大不了的，就是随便问问。

sentences.text_en: When your kids were small, did you ever, I don't know, smack their heads into a wall?
sentences.text_zh: 你家孩子小时候，有没有……嗯，我不知道，把他们的头往墙上撞过？

sentences.text_en: Usually we just gave time outs.
sentences.text_zh: 一般我们都是让他们去‘暂停’一下。

sentences.text_en: Oh, no, no, accidentally.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，不不，是不小心的。

sentences.text_en: Um, we just kind of bonked Lily's head and she, it really wasn't very hard and she's not acting any differently, but I just worried that. . .
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，我们就轻轻碰了一下莉莉的头，其实也没多用力，她也没表现出什么不一样，但我就是有点担心……

sentences.text_en: Relax, it happens.
sentences.text_zh: 别紧张，这种事常有的。

sentences.text_en: Luke used to bang his head all the time and he's fine.
sentences.text_zh: 卢克以前老是用头撞墙，现在不是挺好的吗？

sentences.text_en: Okay, all right, thank you, thanks, it helps.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，行吧，谢谢，这很有帮助。

sentences.text_en: Okay, okay.
sentences.text_zh: 好吧，好吧。

sentences.text_en: We gotta take her to the doctor.
sentences.text_zh: 我们得带她去看医生。

sentences.text_en: Gloria?
sentences.text_zh: 格洛丽亚？

sentences.text_en: I'm here.
sentences.text_zh: 我在这儿。

sentences.text_en: I just dropped Manny off at school, and I realized I just dropped Manny off at school.
sentences.text_zh: 我刚把曼尼送到学校，然后才意识到自己居然把曼尼送到了学校。

sentences.text_en: Oh, boy.
sentences.text_zh: 哎呀。

sentences.text_en: And I was hoping we still have a few more good years before their minds started to. . .
sentences.text_zh: 我还想着，他们的小脑袋还能再好好用上几年呢……

sentences.text_en: No, what I'm saying, we have the day to ourselves the first time in months.
sentences.text_zh: 不，我的意思是，几个月来我们第一次有了属于自己的这一天。

sentences.text_en: We should take advantage of it.
sentences.text_zh: 咱们应该好好利用一下。

sentences.text_en: Go to the club, nice lunch.
sentences.text_zh: 去俱乐部逛逛，吃顿不错的午餐。

sentences.text_en: Some massages.
sentences.text_zh: 再来几次按摩。

sentences.text_en: What about work?
sentences.text_zh: 那工作呢？

sentences.text_en: I'm the boss.
sentences.text_zh: 我是老板啊。

sentences.text_en: Since I married you, people are surprised I come in at all.
sentences.text_zh: 自从嫁给你以后，大家还以为我根本不会来上班呢。

sentences.text_en: Jay's very spontaneous.
sentences.text_zh: 杰很随性。

sentences.text_en: He's always surprising me with little presents, fun getaways.
sentences.text_zh: 他总给我惊喜，送些小礼物、安排些有趣的短途旅行。

sentences.text_en: I wasn't the greatest husband the first time around, but I'm trying to do better this time.
sentences.text_zh: 上次当老公的时候，我做得不算太好，不过这次我正努力改进呢。

sentences.text_en: And maybe by my third marriage, I'll have it down pat.
sentences.text_zh: 说不定到第三次结婚的时候，我就完全上手了。

sentences.text_en: Yeah, that one's gonna cost me.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，那可要花不少钱呢。

sentences.text_en: What you're reading, there, a book?
sentences.text_zh: 你在看什么呢，书吗？

sentences.text_en: Yeah, I've been meaning to get to it for a while.
sentences.text_zh: 是啊，我一直想看看这本书呢。

sentences.text_en: Oh, it's got a map at the beginning.
sentences.text_zh: 哦，开头还有张地图呢。

sentences.text_en: I like it when books do that.
sentences.text_zh: 我喜欢书里有这样的设计。

sentences.text_en: Uh huh.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯哼。

sentences.text_en: Did you have an open house this morning?
sentences.text_zh: 今天上午你有开放日吗？

sentences.text_en: I rescheduled.
sentences.text_zh: 我改了时间。

sentences.text_en: Thought you might like some company.
sentences.text_zh: 想着你可能会需要点陪伴。

sentences.text_en: Well, the first day of school can be tough for stay-at-home moms.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，对居家妈妈来说，开学第一天可不容易呢。

sentences.text_en: Now you have to understand, the kids are gone, the nest is empty, they are rudderless.
sentences.text_zh: 现在你要明白，孩子们走了，家里空荡荡的，他们就像没了舵一样。

sentences.text_en: And a lot of guys wouldn't even notice, but I'm not a lot of guys.
sentences.text_zh: 很多男人可能根本注意不到，但我不算那种人。

sentences.text_en: I listen with my mind, and if you pay attention, women will tell you what they want by telling you the opposite of what they want.
sentences.text_zh: 我用心去听，只要你留心，女人就会通过告诉你她们不要什么，来表达她们想要什么。

sentences.text_en: Like the other day, Claire was like, "You have to move your car.
sentences.text_zh: 就像前几天，克莱尔说：‘你得把车挪走。’

sentences.text_en: There's no space in the garage for both of our cars."
sentences.text_zh: 车库里没地方放我们俩的车了。'

sentences.text_en: And what she's really saying is that, you know, I should probably get a sports car.
sentences.text_zh: 其实她真正想说的是，你知道的，我大概该买辆跑车了。

sentences.text_en: I was sort of looking forward to a quiet day.
sentences.text_zh: 我本来还挺期待过个安静日子的。

sentences.text_en: I thought I'd just read, maybe go for a run later.
sentences.text_zh: 我想就看看书，说不定待会儿去跑跑步。

sentences.text_en: That's it.
sentences.text_zh: 就这样。

sentences.text_en: Great, we'll run together.
sentences.text_zh: 太好了，我们一起跑吧。

sentences.text_en: You don't have to do that.
sentences.text_zh: 你不用非得这样。

sentences.text_en: I know.
sentences.text_zh: 我知道。

sentences.text_en: Listening.
sentences.text_zh: 听着。

sentences.text_en: Thing is, I like to run alone and I run kind of fast, so.
sentences.text_zh: 问题是，我喜欢一个人跑，而且跑得挺快的，所以……

sentences.text_en: So I'm not sure you're gonna be able to keep up with me.
sentences.text_zh: 所以我真不确定你能不能跟上我。

sentences.text_en: You're kidding, right?
sentences.text_zh: 你在开玩笑吧？

sentences.text_en: No.
sentences.text_zh: 不。

sentences.text_en: You really think I can't keep up with you?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的觉得我跟不上你吗？

sentences.text_en: I'm not sure you can keep up with this conversation.
sentences.text_zh: 我不确定你能不能跟上这场对话。

sentences.text_en: I think you're forgetting that I power walk every morning and that I wear my special shoes with the big soles, which were designed by a doctor.
sentences.text_zh: 我觉得你忘了，我每天早上都快步走，还穿那种医生专门设计的大底鞋。

sentences.text_en: Yes, I know.
sentences.text_zh: 是的，我知道。

sentences.text_en: But I run every day.
sentences.text_zh: 但我每天都跑啊。

sentences.text_en: You really think you can run as fast as me?
sentences.text_zh: 你真的觉得你能跑得跟我一样快吗？

sentences.text_en: No, Phil, I think I can run much, much faster than you.
sentences.text_zh: 不，菲尔，我觉得我能跑得比你快得多、多得多。

sentences.text_en: Boom, just like that, the whole day changed.
sentences.text_zh: 砰的一下，整天就这么变了。

sentences.text_en: It was game on.
sentences.text_zh: 比赛开始了。

sentences.text_en: She knew it, I knew it, we both knew it.
sentences.text_zh: 她知道，我知道，我们俩都知道。

sentences.text_en: I just want to read.
sentences.text_zh: 我就想看看书。

sentences.text_en: I think I'll order what I had the last time.
sentences.text_zh: 我想点上次点过的那道菜。

sentences.text_en: What was that called?
sentences.text_zh: 那叫什么来着？

sentences.text_en: Do you just want me to say it because you want me to roll my eyes?
sentences.text_zh: 你是想让我念出来，好让你翻个白眼吗？

sentences.text_en: Come on.
sentences.text_zh: 拜托。

sentences.text_en: Ruben.
sentences.text_zh: 鲁本。

sentences.text_en: Jay, what is this?
sentences.text_zh: 杰伊，这是啥？

sentences.text_en: Ah, looks like my old car cover.
sentences.text_zh: 啊，看起来像是我以前的车罩。

sentences.text_en: Don't give me that, this is Manny's poncho.
sentences.text_zh: 别这套了，这可是曼尼的雨披。

sentences.text_en: What is it doing here?
sentences.text_zh: 它怎么在这儿？

sentences.text_en: Maybe he decided to take it off on the way to school.
sentences.text_zh: 也许他上学路上就把它脱了。

sentences.text_en: What did you say to him?
sentences.text_zh: 你跟他说了啥？

sentences.text_en: Nothing, I told some jokes.
sentences.text_zh: 没说什么，就是讲了几段笑话。

sentences.text_en: You said plenty with your jokes.
sentences.text_zh: 你用笑话可说得够多了。

sentences.text_en: Jay, he looks up to you.
sentences.text_zh: 杰伊，他可仰慕你呢。

sentences.text_en: He respects your opinion.
sentences.text_zh: 他很尊重你的意见。

sentences.text_en: We dodged a bullet on this, trust me.
sentences.text_zh: 这事咱们算是躲过去了，相信我。

sentences.text_en: I've been down this road before.
sentences.text_zh: 这条路我走过不少次了。

sentences.text_en: I remember one time Mitchell decided to wear a jaunty scarf to school.
sentences.text_zh: 我记得有一次米切尔决定戴条俏皮的围巾去上学。

sentences.text_en: I kept my mouth shut.
sentences.text_zh: 我啥也没说。

sentences.text_en: He got his jaunty butt kicked.
sentences.text_zh: 结果他那副俏皮样儿就被揍了一顿。

sentences.text_en: My dad has this perception that I was very flamboyant as a kid, which is just it's nonsense because I kept the whole gay thing very under wraps.
sentences.text_zh: 我爸总以为我小时候特别张扬，其实纯属胡扯，因为我一直把‘同性恋’这事藏得严严实实。

sentences.text_en: I was just a guy's guy.
sentences.text_zh: 我就是个‘男人中的男人’。

sentences.text_en: I was basically a jock, you know?
sentences.text_zh: 基本上就是个运动健将，你知道吧？

sentences.text_en: So we should crush Manny's spirit and destroy everything that makes him who he is.
sentences.text_zh: 所以我们应该狠狠打击曼尼的士气，把他身上所有让他成为自己的东西都给毁了。

sentences.text_en: I'm just saying it's no fun to see your kid get picked on every day, getting tormented just because he's different.
sentences.text_zh: 我只是说，看着自家孩子天天被欺负、被折磨，就因为与众不同，真让人受不了。

sentences.text_en: Now I'm telling you, it rips your heart out.
sentences.text_zh: 现在我告诉你，这简直能把心都撕碎。

sentences.text_en: Well, Batman doesn't get picked on and he wears a cape.
sentences.text_zh: 嗯，蝙蝠侠就不被欺负，他还穿着斗篷呢。

sentences.text_en: A poncho is just a cape that goes all the way around.
sentences.text_zh: 雨披其实就是一圈兜住全身的斗篷。

sentences.text_en: Batman doesn't get picked on because he's a muscular genius.
sentences.text_zh: 蝙蝠侠之所以不被欺负，是因为他是肌肉发达的天才。

sentences.text_en: Manny can't make it to the top bunk.
sentences.text_zh: 曼尼上不了上铺。

sentences.text_en: We're taking this poncho to Manny at school.
sentences.text_zh: 我们要把这件雨披带到学校给曼尼。

sentences.text_en: It's important that he knows that we support him.
sentences.text_zh: 让他知道我们支持他，这点很重要。

sentences.text_en: And then we go get those massages, 'cause that sounded good.
sentences.text_zh: 然后我们再去做个按摩，听起来挺不错的。

items.text_zh: 他总给我惊喜，送些小礼物、安排些有趣的短途旅行。

items.text_en: I wasn't the greatest husband the first time around, but I'm trying to do better this time.
items.text_zh: 上次当老公的时候，我做得不算太好，不过这次我正努力改进呢。

items.text_en: And maybe by my third marriage, I'll have it down pat.
items.text_zh: 说不定到第三次结婚的时候，我就完全上手了。

items.text_en: Yeah, that one's gonna cost me.
items.text_zh: 是啊，那可要花不少钱呢。

items.text_en: What you're reading, there, a book?
items.text_zh: 你在看什么呢，书吗？

items.text_en: Yeah, I've been meaning to get to it for a while.
items.text_zh: 是啊，我一直想看看这本书呢。

items.text_en: Oh, it's got a map at the beginning.
items.text_zh: 哦，开头还有张地图呢。

items.text_en: I like it when books do that.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢书里有这样的设计。

items.text_en: Uh huh.
items.text_zh: 嗯哼。

items.text_en: Did you have an open house this morning?
items.text_zh: 今天上午你有开放日吗？

items.text_en: I rescheduled.
items.text_zh: 我改了时间。

items.text_en: Thought you might like some company.
items.text_zh: 想着你可能会需要点陪伴。

items.text_en: Well, the first day of school can be tough for stay-at-home moms.
items.text_zh: 嗯，对居家妈妈来说，开学第一天可不容易呢。

items.text_en: Now you have to understand, the kids are gone, the nest is empty, they are rudderless.
items.text_zh: 现在你要明白，孩子们走了，家里空荡荡的，他们就像没了舵一样。

items.text_en: And a lot of guys wouldn't even notice, but I'm not a lot of guys.
items.text_zh: 很多男人可能根本注意不到，但我不算那种人。

items.text_en: I listen with my mind, and if you pay attention, women will tell you what they want by telling you the opposite of what they want.
items.text_zh: 我用心去听，只要你留心，女人就会通过告诉你她们不要什么，来表达她们想要什么。

items.text_en: Like the other day, Claire was like, "You have to move your car.
items.text_zh: 就像前几天，克莱尔说：‘你得把车挪走。’

items.text_en: There's no space in the garage for both of our cars."
items.text_zh: 车库里没地方放我们俩的车了。'

items.text_en: And what she's really saying is that, you know, I should probably get a sports car.
items.text_zh: 其实她真正想说的是，你知道的，我大概该买辆跑车了。

items.text_en: I was sort of looking forward to a quiet day.
items.text_zh: 我本来还挺期待过个安静日子的。

items.text_en: I thought I'd just read, maybe go for a run later.
items.text_zh: 我想就看看书，说不定待会儿去跑跑步。

items.text_en: That's it.
items.text_zh: 就这样。

items.text_en: Great, we'll run together.
items.text_zh: 太好了，我们一起跑吧。

items.text_en: You don't have to do that.
items.text_zh: 你不用非得这样。

items.text_en: I know.
items.text_zh: 我知道。

items.text_en: Listening.
items.text_zh: 听着。

items.text_en: Thing is, I like to run alone and I run kind of fast, so.
items.text_zh: 问题是，我喜欢一个人跑，而且跑得挺快的，所以……

items.text_en: So I'm not sure you're gonna be able to keep up with me.
items.text_zh: 所以我真不确定你能不能跟上我。

items.text_en: You're kidding, right?
items.text_zh: 你在开玩笑吧？

items.text_en: No.
items.text_zh: 不。

items.text_en: You really think I can't keep up with you?
items.text_zh: 你真的觉得我跟不上你吗？

items.text_en: I'm not sure you can keep up with this conversation.
items.text_zh: 我不确定你能不能跟上这场对话。

items.text_en: I think you're forgetting that I power walk every morning and that I wear my special shoes with the big soles, which were designed by a doctor.
items.text_zh: 我觉得你忘了，我每天早上都快步走，还穿那种医生专门设计的大底鞋。

items.text_en: Yes, I know.
items.text_zh: 是的，我知道。

items.text_en: But I run every day.
items.text_zh: 但我每天都跑啊。

items.text_en: You really think you can run as fast as me?
items.text_zh: 你真的觉得你能跑得跟我一样快吗？

items.text_en: No, Phil, I think I can run much, much faster than you.
items.text_zh: 不，菲尔，我觉得我能跑得比你快得多、多得多。

items.text_en: Boom, just like that, the whole day changed.
items.text_zh: 砰的一下，整天就这么变了。

items.text_en: It was game on.
items.text_zh: 比赛开始了。

items.text_en: She knew it, I knew it, we both knew it.
items.text_zh: 她知道，我知道，我们俩都知道。

items.text_en: I just want to read.
items.text_zh: 我就想看看书。

items.text_en: I think I'll order what I had the last time.
items.text_zh: 我想点上次点过的那道菜。

items.text_en: What was that called?
items.text_zh: 那叫什么来着？

items.text_en: Do you just want me to say it because you want me to roll my eyes?
items.text_zh: 你是想让我念出来，好让你翻个白眼吗？

items.text_en: Come on.
items.text_zh: 拜托。

items.text_en: Ruben.
items.text_zh: 鲁本。

items.text_en: Jay, what is this?
items.text_zh: 杰伊，这是啥？

items.text_en: Ah, looks like my old car cover.
items.text_zh: 啊，看起来像是我以前的车罩。

items.text_en: Don't give me that, this is Manny's poncho.
items.text_zh: 别这套了，这可是曼尼的雨披。

items.text_en: What is it doing here?
items.text_zh: 它怎么在这儿？

items.text_en: Maybe he decided to take it off on the way to school.
items.text_zh: 也许他上学路上就把它脱了。

items.text_en: What did you say to him?
items.text_zh: 你跟他说了啥？

items.text_en: Nothing, I told some jokes.
items.text_zh: 没说什么，就是讲了几段笑话。

items.text_en: You said plenty with your jokes.
items.text_zh: 你用笑话可说得够多了。

items.text_en: Jay, he looks up to you.
items.text_zh: 杰伊，他可仰慕你呢。

items.text_en: He respects your opinion.
items.text_zh: 他很尊重你的意见。

items.text_en: We dodged a bullet on this, trust me.
items.text_zh: 这事咱们算是躲过去了，相信我。

items.text_en: I've been down this road before.
items.text_zh: 这条路我走过不少次了。

items.text_en: I remember one time Mitchell decided to wear a jaunty scarf to school.
items.text_zh: 我记得有一次米切尔决定戴条俏皮的围巾去上学。

items.text_en: I kept my mouth shut.
items.text_zh: 我啥也没说。

items.text_en: He got his jaunty butt kicked.
items.text_zh: 结果他那副俏皮样儿就被揍了一顿。

items.text_en: My dad has this perception that I was very flamboyant as a kid, which is just it's nonsense because I kept the whole gay thing very under wraps.
items.text_zh: 我爸总以为我小时候特别张扬，其实纯属胡扯，因为我一直把‘同性恋’这事藏得严严实实。

items.text_en: I was just a guy's guy.
items.text_zh: 我就是个‘男人中的男人’。

items.text_en: I was basically a jock, you know?
items.text_zh: 基本上就是个运动健将，你知道吧？

items.text_en: So we should crush Manny's spirit and destroy everything that makes him who he is.
items.text_zh: 所以我们应该狠狠打击曼尼的士气，把他身上所有让他成为自己的东西都给毁了。

items.text_en: I'm just saying it's no fun to see your kid get picked on every day, getting tormented just because he's different.
items.text_zh: 我只是说，看着自家孩子天天被欺负、被折磨，就因为与众不同，真让人受不了。

items.text_en: Now I'm telling you, it rips your heart out.
items.text_zh: 现在我告诉你，这简直能把心都撕碎。

items.text_en: Well, Batman doesn't get picked on and he wears a cape.
items.text_zh: 嗯，蝙蝠侠就不被欺负，他还穿着斗篷呢。

items.text_en: A poncho is just a cape that goes all the way around.
items.text_zh: 雨披其实就是一圈兜住全身的斗篷。

items.text_en: Batman doesn't get picked on because he's a muscular genius.
items.text_zh: 蝙蝠侠之所以不被欺负，是因为他是肌肉发达的天才。

items.text_en: Manny can't make it to the top bunk.
items.text_zh: 曼尼上不了上铺。

items.text_en: We're taking this poncho to Manny at school.
items.text_zh: 我们要把这件雨披带到学校给曼尼。

items.text_en: It's important that he knows that we support him.
items.text_zh: 让他知道我们支持他，这点很重要。

items.text_en: And then we go get those massages, 'cause that sounded good.
items.text_zh: 然后我们再去做个按摩，听起来挺不错的。
